sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current green dot: (38-39, 12-13) = (top, right)
# I want to move red block to rows 24-29, cols 18-21 to fill the vertical gap
# Need green dot at (top, left) = (38-39, 8-9)
# From (top, right), need LEFT, LEFT

print("Moving to (top, left) and clicking red...")
result = action(['LEFT', 'LEFT', {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 19, 'col': 48}])
print(f"Result: done={last_action_result.get('done')}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nAll blocks:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
    cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
    min_r, max_r = min(rows), max(rows)
    min_c, max_c = min(cols), max(cols)
    if max_c < 30 and n['pixels'] > 4:
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, "
              f"bbox=[{min_r},{min_c}]-[{max_r},{max_c}]")

print("\nLayout:")
for i in range(18, 44):
    row_str = ascii_lines[i][6:28]
    has_content = any(c in row_str for c in 'RbN Y')
    if has_content:
        print(f"  Row {i}: {row_str}")

print(f"\nLevel done: {last_action_result.get('done', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

# Current green dot: (38-39, 12-13) = (top, right)

print(f"Result: done={last_action_result.get('done')}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nAll blocks:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
    cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
    min_r, max_r = min(rows), max(rows)
    min_c, max_c = min(cols), max(cols)
    if max_c < 30 and n['pixels'] > 4:
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, "
              f"bbox=[{min_r},{min_c}]-[{max_r},{max_c}]")

print("\nLayout:")
for i in range(18, 44):
    row_str = ascii_lines[i][6:28]
    has_content = any(c in row_str for c in 'RbN Y')
    if has_content:
        print(f"  Row {i}: {row_str}")

print(f"\nLevel done: {last_action_result.get('done', False)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
